steps.description: Cell intesity files (CEL files) were generated in the Genechip Command Console Software (AGCC), (Affymetrix, Santa Clara, CA, USA)
steps.code_example:
# CEL files are generated using the Genechip Command Console Software (AGCC).
# This is typically a GUI-based process performed on the Affymetrix instrument workstation,
# not a direct command-line execution in a bioinformatics pipeline.
# The output of this step are the raw CEL intensity files.

raw_text: Cell intesity files (CEL files) were generated in the Genechip Command Console Software (AGCC), (Affymetrix, Santa Clara, CA, USA)
